article.title: New York Bans Government Employees from Insider Trading on Prediction Markets
article.summary: A new executive order seen by WIRED prohibits New York state employees from using insider knowledge to enrich themselves with prediction market bets.
article.title_zh: 紐約州禁止政府員工在預測市場上內幕交易
article.summary_zh: WIRED 獲得的新行政命令禁止紐約州員工使用內幕知識進行預測市場投注以牟利。

article.title: Lawsuit: Nintendo is getting tariff refunds—its customers should get them instead
article.summary: Two gamers who want tariff refunds sued Nintendo of America yesterday, alleging that the company intends to pocket refunds received from the government instead of giving money back to consumers who paid higher prices. The class action complaint seeks to represent a class including the two named plaintiffs and all other US residents who bought Nintendo products from February 2025 to February 2026. "Unless restrained by this Court, Nintendo stands to recover the same tariff payments twice—once from consumers through higher prices and again from the federal government through tariff refunds, including interest paid by the government on those funds," said the lawsuit filed in US District Court for the Western District of Washington. "Nintendo has made no legally binding commitment to return ta
article.title_zh: 訴訟：Nintendo 獲得關稅退款—應該退給消費者
article.summary_zh: 兩名遊戲玩家昨日控告 Nintendo of America，聲稱該公司意圖保留政府關稅退款而非返還給支付高價的消費者。

article.title: FCC alters the Wi-Fi router ban to include hotspots — pray it doesn’t alter the deal any further
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR The FCC has updated the FAQ on its ban of foreign-made Wi-Fi routers. The update adds that the ban also covers foreign-made portable Wi-Fi hotspots and LTE/5G CPE devices. Mobile phones with hotspot features remain safe from the ban. The US Federal Communications Commission (FCC) recently banned all foreign-made consumer-grade Wi-Fi routers . While there are a few exceptions, this effectively prevents any new foreign-made routers from being sold or imported into the US. The government agency has now expanded the ban to include Wi-Fi hotspots and LTE/5G customer premises equipment (CPE) devices. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: FCC 擴大 Wi-Fi 路由器禁令範圍至熱點設備
article.summary_zh: FCC 更新了對外國製造 Wi-Fi 路由器禁令的常見問題解答，禁令現已涵蓋外國製造的便攜式 Wi-Fi 熱點和 LTE/5G CPE 設備。具有熱點功能的手機仍不受禁令影響。

article.title: Comcast shares climb amid narrowing broadband losses, record mobile gains
article.summary: Comcast shed a better-than-expected 65,000 broadband subs alongside a record gain of 435,000 mobile lines in Q1 thanks in part to its pivot to new pricing and packaging. A challenge ahead? Converting free mobile lines to paid.
article.title_zh: Comcast 股價上漲，寬頻流失縮小、行動業務創紀錄增長
article.summary_zh: Comcast 第一季度寬頻用戶流失為 65,000，優於預期，同時行動線淨增 435,000 條，創下新高，主要歸功於定價和套餐策略調整。

article.title: DeepSeek Unveils Flagship AI Model a Year After Breakthrough
article.summary: DeepSeek rolled out preview versions of a new flagship artificial intelligence model a year after upending Silicon Valley, calling it the most powerful open-source platform in a challenge to rivals from OpenAI to Anthropic PBC.
article.title_zh: DeepSeek在突破一年後推出旗艦AI模型
article.summary_zh: DeepSeek在顛覆矽谷一年後推出了新旗艦人工智慧模型的預覽版本，聲稱這是最強大的開源平台，對OpenAI至Anthropic等競爭對手發起挑戰。

article.title: Will Social Media Bans Actually Work? | Bloomberg Tech: Asia 4/24/2026
article.summary: As concerns grow over the dangers of social media, more and more countries face the challenging task of balancing exposure to addictive algorithms with free speech. In this episode of Bloomberg: Tech Asia, Shery Ahn speaks with Philippine Senator Win Gatchalian, social psychologist Ravi Iyer, and Bloomberg Opinion's Catherine Thorbecke about the global push to regulate social platforms, and whether bans can truly make a difference. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: 社群媒體禁令真的有效嗎？| Bloomberg Tech: Asia 4/24/2026
article.summary_zh: 隨著人們對社群媒體危害的擔憂日益增加，越來越多國家面臨平衡接觸成癮演算法與言論自由的挑戰。

article.title: Amazon Eero and Leo routers gain FCC Conditional Approval for US sales — Eero products can skirt router ban for the next 18 months, firm joins Netgear on approval list
article.summary: Amazon’s Eero is the latest router manufacturer to gain “Conditional Approval” from the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to sell its routers in the United States.
article.title_zh: Amazon Eero 和 Leo 路由器獲得 FCC 美國銷售有條件批准 — Eero 產品可在未來 18 個月內規避路由器禁令，公司加入 Netgear 批准名單
article.summary_zh: Amazon Eero 成為最新獲得美國 FCC「有條件批准」的路由器製造商，獲准在美國銷售其路由器產品。

article.title: New Zealand Passed a Generational Smoking Ban in 2022, But Repealed It Before It Went Into Effect
article.title_zh: 紐西蘭在 2022 年通過了代際吸菸禁令，但在生效前就廢除了

article.title: Norway Set to Become Latest Country to Ban Social Media for Under 16s
article.summary: Norway plans to restrict access to social media for children under 16, joining a growing number of countries responding to concerns about the potential harm kids face online.
article.title_zh: 挪威將成為最新禁止 16 歲以下未成年人使用社媒的國家
article.summary_zh: 挪威計劃限制 16 歲以下兒童訪問社交媒體，加入越來越多應對兒童在線潛在危害的國家行列。

article.title: China Seeks Closer Thai, Cambodia Ties While Warning on Scams
article.summary: China’s top envoy Wang Yi signaled Beijing’s concerns about online scams emanating from Southeast Asia as he visited Thailand and Cambodia in a bid to boost links with both nations.
article.title_zh: 中國尋求加強泰國柬埔寨關係 同時警告詐騙風險
article.summary_zh: 中國特使王毅訪問泰國和柬埔寨，表達對東南亞網路詐騙的關注，並尋求加強與兩國的關係。

article.title: Philippines Looks to Follow Australia's Social Media Ban
article.summary: Philippine Senator Win Gatchalian discusses his push to enact social media policies similar to those in Australia, in an effort to protect minors from excessive use and mental health harm. He speaks with Shery Ahn on “Bloomberg Tech: Asia.” (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: 菲律賓擬效仿澳洲社交媒體禁令
article.summary_zh: 菲律賓參議員 Win Gatchalian 推動制定類似澳洲的社交媒體政策，以保護未成年人免受過度使用和心理健康傷害。

article.title: Here’s what that Google Home ‘no longer available’ automation warning actually means
article.summary: TL;DR Google Home users have been getting messages warning about changes to automations in early May. Google now clarifies that Home is losing the ability to perform phone-related actions through automations. All other automations will keep on functioning as normal. Earlier today we shared with you the confusing message that Google Home users reported hearing from their devices, warning them of some automation-related functionality going away next month . Worried about just how impactful those changes might be, we reached out to Google in the hopes of getting some clarification — and we’ve just heard back with new details on exactly what’s happening. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: Google Home「不再可用」自動化警告的實際含義
article.summary_zh: Google Home 用戶收到自動化變更警告，Google 澄清 Home 將失去透過自動化執行電話相關操作的功能，其他自動化將保持正常運作。

article.title: Cryptic Google Home warning has users worried about losing key smart home features (Update)
article.summary: TL;DR Home users report receiving a message that “phone actions and automations will no longer be available starting in the first week of May.” Google does not appear to have publicly shared any notice of a change to how automations work. We’ve reached out to Google in the hopes of getting an explanation, but have not yet heard back. Update, April 24, 2026 (04:30 PM ET): Google has responded to our inquiry and delivered an explanation about what’s actually happening to automations next month. Original article, April 24, 2026 (02:17 PM ET): Setting up your smart home can be a huge undertaking, configuring every last device just the way you like it — but once you have everything perfectly tweaked, you can just sit back and enjoy, right? Well, that’s sure what we’d like to believe, but we’re
article.title_zh: 神秘的 Google Home 警告令用戶擔憂失去關鍵智慧家居功能（更新）
article.summary_zh: Home 用戶報告收到「電話操作和自動化將於5月第一周不再可用」的訊息，Google 並未公開發佈此變更通知。

article.title: FCC Wi-Fi router ban adds another manufacturer’s models to exception list
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Amazon Eero and Leo routers have gained “conditional approval” from the FCC. This approval applies to the Eero, Eero Pro, Eero Max, Eero PoE, Eero Outdoor, Eero Signal, and Amazon Leo. These routers are exempt from the ban until October 31, 2027. Earlier this year, the US Federal Communications Commission (FCC) implemented a ban on all new foreign-made Wi-Fi routers . However, the government agency has started doling out “conditional approval” for some manufacturers. Netgear was among the first to receive conditional approval for its devices. Now another popular brand has also been granted approval. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: FCC Wi-Fi 路由器禁令為另一製造商的型號新增至例外清單
article.summary_zh: Amazon Eero 和 Leo 路由器已獲得 FCC「有條件批准」，包括多個型號在內，這些路由器豁免至 2027 年 10 月 31 日。

article.title: Nvidia Breakout Sends Chip Giant to First Record Since October
article.summary: Nvidia Corp. shares rose to their first record in months on Friday, the latest example of improving momentum at the leader in artificial intelligence chips.
article.title_zh: Nvidia突破性進展使晶片巨頭創十月以來首次新高
article.summary_zh: Nvidia股份週五創下數月來首次紀錄新高，這是AI晶片領導者勢頭改善的最新體現。

article.title: FCC: Router ban includes portable hotspots, but not phones with hotspot features
article.summary: The Federal Communications Commission clarified this week that its sweeping ban on foreign-made consumer routers also affects portable hotspot devices. The FCC added a new section to an FAQ titled, "Is my device a consumer-grade router under the National Security Determination?" The new FAQ section says this category includes "consumer-grade portable or mobile MiFi Wi-Fi or hotspot devices for residential use." The ban does not cover "mobile phones with hotspot features," the FAQ says. This means that companies making consumer hotspots need an exemption from the government to import and sell any future hotspots that haven't previously been approved by the FCC. As with routers, devices previously approved for sale in the US can continue to be imported and sold without obtaining a special ex
article.title_zh: FCC：路由器禁令包括便攜式熱點，但不包括具有熱點功能的手機
article.summary_zh: 聯邦通訊委員會本週澄清，其全面禁止外國製造消費級路由器的禁令也影響便攜式熱點設備。FCC在常見問題解答中新增一個部分，標題為「根據國家安全決定，我的設備是消費級路由器嗎？」

article.title: How a cavalcade of blunders gave unauthorized users access to Claude Mythos — restricted model accessed by third parties, thanks to knowledge from data breach
article.summary: Unauthorized individuals have accessed Anthropic's new Mythos cybersecurity-focused AI model, despite the developer locking it down to just a handful of companies. Considering the AI was purposefully designed to find zero-day exploits and offer viable fixes, the breach raises questions about Anthropic's own security, and why Mythos couldn't protect it.
article.title_zh: 一系列失誤導致未授權使用者存取Claude Mythos — 受限制模型被第三方存取，源於資料洩露
article.summary_zh: 儘管Anthropic將新型網路安全專用AI模型Claude Mythos限制在少數幾家公司使用，但未授權人士仍成功存取了該模型。鑑於該AI旨在發現零日漏洞並提供修復方案，此次洩露事件引發了對Anthropic安全措施的質疑。

article.title: Google unveils two new TPUs designed for the "agentic era"
article.summary: Most of the companies that have fully committed to building AI models are gobbling up every Nvidia AI accelerator they can get, but Google has taken a different approach. Most of its cloud AI infrastructure is based on its line of custom Tensor processing units (TPUs). After announcing the seventh-gen Ironwood TPU in 2025, the company has moved on to the eighth-gen version , but it's not just a faster iteration of the same chip. The new TPUs come in two flavors, providing Google and its customers with an AI platform that is faster and more efficient, the company says. Google is pushing the idea that the "agent era" is fundamentally different from the AI systems that came before, necessitating a new approach to the hardware. So engineers have devised the TPU8t (for training) and the TPU 8i
article.title_zh: Google 推出為「智能代理時代」設計的兩款新 TPU
article.summary_zh: Google 採用自主開發的 Tensor 處理器 TPU 作為雲端 AI 基礎設施，推出第七代 TPU 以適應智能代理時代。

article.title: You can now run Linux on your ancient Windows 95 desktop with a new tool — very old Windows PCs, back to Intel 486, can cooperatively run very modern Linux kernels with WSL9x
article.summary: WSL9x enables users to run the most modern Linux kernels in Microsoft OSes as old as Windows 95.
article.title_zh: 您現在可以使用新工具在古老的 Windows 95 桌上型電腦上執行 Linux — 遠古 Windows PC（回溯至 Intel 486）可透過 WSL9x 協作執行非常現代的 Linux 核心
article.summary_zh: WSL9x 使用者能夠在 Windows 95 一樣古老的 Microsoft 作業系統中執行最現代的 Linux 核心。

article.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
article.summary: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.
article.title_zh: Google Cloud 推出兩款新 AI 晶片與 Nvidia 競爭
article.summary_zh: Google 最新的 TPU 比前代版本更快更便宜，但公司目前仍在雲端服務中採用 Nvidia。

article.title: Alibaba Adds China Eastern Flight Booking to Flagship Qwen App
article.summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.’s Qwen AI app now helps users book China Eastern Airlines Corp. flights directly, the first time it’s opened its agentic AI technology to a major commercial partner.
article.title_zh: 阿里巴巴在旗艦 Qwen 應用中新增中國東方航空訂票功能
article.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴集團控股有限公司的 Qwen AI 應用現在可以幫助用戶直接預訂中國東方航空公司航班，這是它首次向主要商業合作夥伴開放代理 AI 技術。

article.title: Tencent Unveils AI Model in High-Stakes Test for OpenAI Hire
article.summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. revealed a major upgrade to its foundational model, marking the first high-stakes test for China’s most valuable company to assert its place in a frenetic AI race since it recruited a top researcher from OpenAI.
article.title_zh: 騰訊推出 AI 模型進行 OpenAI 聘用者高風險測試
article.summary_zh: 騰訊控股有限公司推出基礎模型重大升級，標誌著中國最有價值的公司在招募 OpenAI 頂級研究員後，首次進行的高風險測試。

article.title: Claude just gained Spotify music and podcast integration, here’s what it can do
article.summary: Spotify is celebrating its 20th birthday today, and one new gift for users is Claude integration. Spotify’s music and podcast streaming service now integrates with Anthropic’s AI. Here’s how it works. more…
article.title_zh: Claude 現已支持 Spotify 音樂和播客整合，以下是其功能
article.summary_zh: Spotify 今天慶祝成立 20 週年，新的用戶禮物是 Claude 整合。Spotify 音樂和播客串流服務現已與 Anthropic 的 AI 整合。

article.title: TCL’s latest Google TV lineup is now available in the US, already up to $2,000 off
article.summary: TCL has launched its latest lineup of Google TV sets in the US, with some models already up to $2,000 off. more…
article.title_zh: TCL 最新 Google TV 陣容現已在美國推出，部分型號已折扣 $2,000
article.summary_zh: TCL 已在美國推出其最新 Google TV 電視陣容，部分型號已享受高達 $2,000 的折扣。

article.title: Google’s Home and Nest Community is getting a big redesign with new categories and a Gemini space
article.summary: TL;DR Google is overhauling the Fitbit Community and the Google Home and Nest Community next month. The changes include a new look, smarter categories, and a dedicated Gemini for Home discussion space. Post history won’t be available on either forum after the changes take effect, and Fitbit users will need an entirely new account. Google offers dedicated support communities for users to provide feedback and ask questions about the company’s products and services. These include the Fitbit Community and the Google Home and Nest Community , which are being significantly overhauled next month, the company announced today. Google says the upgrades aren’t “just a fresh coat of paint” and instead mark “a foundational shift.” The highlights include a fresh design, intuitive categories, and streaml
article.title_zh: Google Home 和 Nest 社區即將進行大規模重新設計，新增分類和 Gemini 專區
article.summary_zh: Google 將於下月大幅改版 Fitbit Community 和 Google Home and Nest Community，包括新外觀、更智慧的分類和專門的 Gemini 討論空間。

article.title: Google推Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform，Vertex AI服務整併至新企業AI代理平臺
article.summary: Google在Cloud Next 2026發表Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform，這是以Vertex AI為基礎打造的新企業級AI代理平臺。Vertex AI服務及其未來更新都將改由Agent Platform交付，而非再以獨立服務形式提供。新平臺會以建構、擴展、治理與最佳化四面向，涵蓋企業級AI代理的完整生命周期。
article.title_zh: Google推Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform，Vertex AI服務整併至新企業AI代理平臺
article.summary_zh: Google在Cloud Next 2026發表Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform，以Vertex AI為基礎打造的新企業級AI代理平臺。該平臺涵蓋建構、擴展、治理與最佳化四面向，Vertex AI服務未來將改由Agent Platform交付。
